description_long: This is a life-sized adult female figure with a naturalistic human form, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. The figure has a slender build, defined musculature, and realistic anatomical proportions. She is wearing high-heeled sandals and appears unclothed except for footwear, with no visible accessories or carried items. Her hair is styled in a neat, medium-length ponytail at the back of her head. The skin surface is smooth and matte, with subtle shading to indicate contours and joints. The overall appearance is that of a typical urban pedestrian, suitable for use in city or street environments.
description: A realistic adult female figure standing upright with a slender build, high-heeled sandals, and a ponytail hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and extended arms, with high-heeled sandals clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the ponytail at the back of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the ponytail, with both heels visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body and the ponytail, mirroring the left side.
